headline: Why Bill Gates Got Special Invite From Elon Musk To Drive Tesla Semi When Deliveries Begin Dec. 1
summary: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) is all set to commence deliveries of its Semi on Dec. 1, and the first vehicles will be received by beverage giant PepsiCo.

headline: Shanghai Hit By COVID Protests: Demonstrators Chant 'Xi Jinping Step Down, CCP Step Down'
summary: On Sunday, protests spread across Shanghai and Beijing against China's strict 'zero COVID' policies. It's been almost three years since China has followed some of the strictest COVID restrictions in the world.
